hero.title:
Your SoloQ Call 
Automatic
hero.description: Voice League detects your League of Legends matches and creates temporary voice channels instantly for your team.

monitoring.title: Active Monitoring
monitoring.description: Uses Riot Games API to detect in real-time when you enter the Rift.

dynamic.title: Dynamic Channels
dynamic.description: Automatic creation of exclusive voice rooms that auto-destroy after the match.

autojoin.title: Auto-Join
autojoin.description: Moves you and your duo/team automatically to the right channel, no extra clicks.

step1.title: Link your account
step1.description: Use the <cmd>/register</cmd> command with your Riot ID (Ex: Faker#KR1).

step2.title: Enable Monitoring
step2.description: Enable <cmd>/autojoin</cmd> so the bot takes care of everything for you.

step3.title: Join the Match
step3.description: As soon as the game loads, your channel will be ready waiting for you.

support.title: Buy Gragas a Round
support.description: Voice League is an open source project. Your donations keep the servers on and help us continue improving the bot.
support.footerNote: Every amount raised is fully reinvested in infrastructure and service maintenance.

footer.copyright: © 2024 Voice League by <linkAutor>Dev-Etto</linkAutor>. Inspired by League of Legends.
